THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT REZAZADEH, ALIREZA BAGIRAN TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT CHU, JONATHAN HOI HO JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF ALIREZA BAGIRAN REZAZADEH AND AGAINST JONATHAN HOI HO CHU; TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $0.00.
